heading.text: , building across the stack for five years.

page.subhead: Five years of production work across SaaS, e-learning platforms, and client apps. Promoted on output, retained on reliability, and still shipping.

bullets: Built and shipped full-stack web products for international clients: SaaS dashboards, booking platforms with payments, and conversion-focused marketing front-ends.
Held a 100% Job Success score across long-running engagements, with repeat hires and 1,400+ tracked hours.
Added production AI features to client apps with the OpenAI and Anthropic APIs: chatbots, content generation, and document processing.
Owned each build end to end: data model, REST APIs, typed React/Next.js frontends, and deployment.
Developed custom Moodle plugins across types: activity, local, block, authentication, and theme.
Built and maintained the platform's custom Moodle theme in PHP, CSS, and JavaScript.
Integrated external web services and APIs, and automated operations with scheduled CRON tasks.
Designed the MySQL data architecture and wrote complex SQL for reporting and data operations.
Led frontend development with React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Built secure authentication and validation flows with React and Redux Saga.
Created design-accurate UI components with Shadcn UI and Ant Design.
Integrated APIs with Redux Saga for clean state management and performance.
Built and improved production apps with React and React Native in an agile team.
Supervised a small frontend team and reviewed pull requests across the project.
Rewrote business logic and structure for better performance and readability.
Translated designs and wireframes into maintainable, high-quality code.
Built front-end websites with Bootstrap and JavaScript.
Created reusable components for future projects.
